mapper.sql: select item_id, order_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, spec, price, quantity, total_price, create_time from t_scan_order_item
mapper.select: where order_id = #{orderId} order by item_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into t_scan_order_item (order_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, spec, price, quantity, total_price, create_time) values (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productImage}, #{spec}, #{price}, #{quantity}, #{totalPrice}, #{createTime})

insert into t_scan_order_item (order_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, spec, price, quantity, total_price, create_time) values
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.productImage}, #{item.spec}, #{item.price}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.totalPrice}, #{item.createTime})
